title: Senior Revenue Manager at Lemon Tree Hotels

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Lemon Tree Hotels
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, Lemon Tree Hotels in Amritsar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Lemon Tree Hotels:
Lemon Tree Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Event Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lemon Tree Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
